title: Docs roadmap pack — fabric-os
principle: Anything that is “what we are building next” lives under docs/roadmap/ (or is linked from it). No other docs layer may contain roadmap narrative. Foundation roadmap.md becomes pointer-only to docs/roadmap/roadmap-current.md.

technical.purpose: Technical roadmap lane — links to docs/architecture/specs/* + pm/* execution truth

ux-design.purpose: UX/design roadmap lane — links to docs/product/*

gtm.purpose: GTM roadmap lane — links to ops/gtm/* + docs/business/* (no duplication of ops manifests)

legal.purpose: Legal lane — links to ops/legal/* and/or docs/operations/legalops-* (narrative only)

compliance.purpose: Compliance lane — links to ops/compliance/* + docs/operations/compliance/* (narrative only)

partnerships.purpose: Partnerships lane — links to docs/business/partnerships/* (+ ops bindings if any)

forbiddenDuplicates: docs/foundation/roadmap.md must be pointer-only to docs/roadmap/roadmap-current.md
